name: Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté the onion and celery in butter over medium heat until softened.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to a slow cooker.
3. Cover and cook on Low for 8-10 hours or on High for 3-4 hours, stirring occasionally.
Note: This sauce can be doubled if desired; it freezes well, too.
